1. fixed,2.range,3. releae,4 latest,property based

goals are predefined tasks used to automate building, compiling, testing, packaging, and deploying a project. 

Main Purpose of Maven
1. Dependency Management
Automatically downloads required libraries from Maven repository.
Example:
Selenium
TestNG
WebDriverManager
Instead of manually adding JAR files, Maven manages them through pom.xml.
2. Buid Automation
Automates project build process.
Commands:
mvn clean
mvn compile
mvn test
mvn package
Purpose:
Reducs manual work
Standardizes build process
3. Project Structure Management
Provides standard folder structure.
Example:
src/main/java
src/test/java
src/test/resources
Purpose:
Easy maintenance
Better team collaboration
4. Test Execution
Runs automation or unit tests easily.
Example:

mvn test
Used with:
Selenium
TestNG
JUnit
5. CI/CD Integration
Integrates with tools like:
Jenkins
GitHub
Docker
Purpose:
Automatic build and test execution in pipelines
6. Reporting

Generates reports after execution.

Examples:

Surefire reports
Allure reports
Extent reports
7. Version Management

Manages dependency versions centrally using pom.xml.

Purpose:

Avoids conflicts
Ensures compatibility
